evidence: "Well done drama with an interesting story."
"This British comedy drama presents a very interesting look at life in a little fishing village in the British Isles."
"The story was easy-going and very well acted."
"A amusing and interesting story without a lot of unnecessary drama."
"The plot never gets tiring and new twists appear in almost every episode."
"The story contains a lot of funny situations as well as some fascinating drama."
"Their day-to-day struggles are beautifully documented by a British film crew, and I found this story extremely interesting."
"Very well done drama based on a fictional White House administration."

summary: The user enjoys well-crafted dramas and comedies, appreciating strong writing and acting. They prefer straightforward narratives with a slower pace, valuing emotional depth and production quality highly.
